name: AI Security Assessment
description: End-to-end review of LLM/AI surfaces against OWASP LLM Top 10 and MITRE ATLAS.

name: AI Red Teaming
description: Adversarial testing of agents and copilots — jailbreaks, data exfiltration, abuse cases.

name: Prompt Injection Testing
description: Targeted testing of prompt injection paths in production LLM workflows.

name: Data Protection & Privacy Review
description: PHI/PII flows, residency, and consent in AI data pipelines.

name: Cloud Security Review
description: Hardening multi-tenant cloud across IAM, networking, and KMS.

name: AI Governance & Compliance
description: NIST AI RMF / ISO 42001 alignment for regulated buyers.

name: Model Risk Assessment
description: Model lifecycle risks including poisoning, drift, and validation gaps.

name: Security Architecture Review
description: Design review for AI platform architecture and trust boundaries.

name: 24/7 Security Monitoring
description: Continuous detection for AI workloads and cloud control planes.
